problem id: 6d9ff2a3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(2)

examples:
  11100000 -> 00111000
  11100010 -> 00111000
  00010000 -> 00000100
  10010011 -> 00100100
  00101011 -> 00001010
  10010010 -> 00100100
  01110001 -> 00011100
  01111100 -> 00011111
  10000110 -> 00100001
  01000000 -> 00010000

query: 11001011
predicted answer: 00110010
